  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Cite mediawiki/extensions/UniversalLanguageSelector mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor mediawiki/extensions/WikimediaMessages mediawiki/extensions/AbuseFilter mediawiki/extensions/Echo mediawiki/extensions/EventLogging

  --rm \

  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/AntiSpoof mediawiki/extensions/CentralAuth mediawiki/extensions/WikiEditor

  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor mediawiki/extensions/Wikibase

  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \

  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \

  -v $PWD/src_4:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/PageViewInfo \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true

  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src_4:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/TimedMediaHandler \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true

  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bookworm-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Cite mediawiki/extensions/ConfirmEdit mediawiki/extensions/DiscussionTools mediawiki/extensions/FlaggedRevs mediawiki/extensions/Linter mediawiki/extensions/TemplateData

  --skip-deps \
  --run selenium

To address all issues possible (including breaking changes), run:
  npm audit fix --force

a different dependency.
